name: Baseline _default (×1.0): RBO + window + squareoff + pf_sl + move_sl

params.complex_settings: RBO Any+cancel + window 10-15 + sqoff 15:30 + pf_sl 50 + move_sl 600s

expected: Baseline avg_fill_qty captured here; later tests should scale by their multipliers.

name: alice (×2.0): same complex bundle as T01 — order qty must DOUBLE

params.complex_settings: RBO Any+cancel + window 10-15 + sqoff 15:30 + pf_sl 50 + move_sl 600s

name: bob (×0.5): same complex bundle — order qty must HALVE

params.complex_settings: RBO Any+cancel + window 10-15 + sqoff 15:30 + pf_sl 50 + move_sl 600s

name: trader_agg (×3.0): trailing target + reverse-on-SL + Mon-Fri

params.complex_settings: pf_tgt 30 + trail 20/10/5 + pf_sl 60 backstop + reverse-on-SL + weekdays

expected: avg_fill_qty == 3 × baseline; trades fire weekdays only; reverses generate paired fills

name: trader_safe (×0.01): safety scaling + RBO + trailing pf_sl

params.complex_settings: RBO + window + squareoff + pf_sl 80 + trailing 20/10 + move_sl

expected: avg_fill_qty ≈ 1% of baseline; pf_sl rarely fires due to tiny exposure

name: runaway (×100000): admin cap MUST clamp — order qty == per-symbol cap

params.complex_settings: RBO + pf_sl 50 + cap=10M (FX) — math would overflow without cap

expected: avg_fill_qty == 10,000,000 (admin cap binds; multiplier alone would yield 1e8)

name: Allowlist save: bob blocked on EURUSD (allowlist=[BTCUSD])

observations.error: Instrument 'EURUSD' is not in user 'bob's allowed_instruments. Ask admin to update the allowlist.

name: Allowlist backtest stream: bob blocked on EURUSD — error event
expected: First NDJSON line carries event=error with 'allowed_instruments' in message
detail: first stream event: {'event': 'error', 'error': "Instrument 'EURUSD' is not in user 'bob's allowed_instruments. Ask admin to update the allowlist."}

first_event.error: Instrument 'EURUSD' is not in user 'bob's allowed_instruments. Ask admin to update the allowlist.

name: Allowlist standalone backtest: alice blocked on BTCUSD
expected: HTTP 403 — standalone path enforces same allowlist as portfolio path

observations.error: Instrument 'BTCUSD' is not in user 'alice's allowed_instruments. Ask admin to update the allowlist.

name: Per-user portfolio isolation: separate portfolios/<user_id>/ dirs
expected: alice's portfolio invisible to bob's list call
detail: alice saves=200; alice sees AuditPF_T10=True; bob sees=False

name: Identity gate: 401 when X-User-Id is missing on mutating endpoints
Picker endpoint /api/users/list: returns only {user_id, alias}
expected: 200; multiplier and allowed_instruments NOT exposed via this endpoint

name: /api/users/me: full read-only row for active session user
expected: multiplier and allowed_instruments match registry; per-header switching works
detail: alice: mul=2.0, allow=['EURUSD', 'GBPUSD', 'USDJPY'] | bob: mul=0.5, allow=['BTCUSD']

name: Report scoping: /api/orderbook/list returns only the caller's files
expected: No cross-user file leakage; each session sees its own reports/<user_id>/ contents only
detail: alice list contains alice-probe=True; bob list cross-leak=False

name: Admin live-edit: multiplier change visible on next request (no restart)
expected: get_user reads users.json on every call; new multiplier visible immediately
detail: carol multiplier before=1.5, after admin save=5.0
